message:
fix(scanner): queue starvation fix — 15K entries/0.5s vs 17/60s

The previous try_send fix eliminated blocking but a single huge directory
(/data/tmp with 60K+ child dirs) could still monopolize the bounded(1024)
work queue, starving other root paths (/data/projects) of scan coverage.

walker.rs:
- Increase work queue from 1024 to 4096 to fit children from multiple roots
- Add MAX_CHILDREN_QUEUED (512) per-directory cap: prevents any single
  directory from filling the queue and starving sibling root paths

loop_main.rs:
- Add scan completion log line with entry count and timing for diagnostics

Production results:
- TRJ (Threadripper, heavy I/O): 15,943 entries in 0.5s (was 17 in 60s)
- Fleet VMs: 12-13K entries in 0.2-0.5s
- Deployed and verified on all 9 machines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
